title: Notion database page not updating issue
symptom: The Notion Database Page update tool fails to update any data in the database. Users see no changes reflected after attempting updates.
applies_when: Using Notion Database Page update node
Correct credentials and permissions are set
not_this_if: The issue is with a different node or integration
Updates are being made in a different environment
root_cause: The error occurs when the property names or types in the payload do not match the expected schema in Notion. If the database schema is not correctly configured or the properties are not set up properly in the n8n node, updates will fail.
fix_steps: Review the database schema in Notion to ensure property names and types match exactly what is sent in the payload.
Check the Notion node configuration in n8n to ensure the Page ID and properties to update are correctly set.
Make sure the Notion credentials have the necessary read/write permissions.
Test the update with a simple property change to verify functionality.
agent_instruction: Ensure the Notion node is correctly configured with matching property names and types as per the Notion database schema.
